title: MVS AgentPrompt
description: The complete input payload for the AI Agent, containing the work order and all necessary file context.

work_order.description: The directive from the AI Orchestrator specifying the task and required context.

active_task.description: The path to the active task file.

task_content.description: The full content of the active task file.

required_context_files.description: A list of file paths the Orchestrator determined are necessary to complete the task.

context_files.description: The full contents of the files requested in the work_order.

recent_events.description: The last few entries from the event log.

file_tree.description: A string representation of the project's file tree.

operational_protocol.description: The operational protocol governing the agent's behavior and interaction model.
